# Muzari Exports

> Premium fresh produce exporter from Kerala, India — supplying farm-direct Robusta & Nethra bananas, tapioca roots, and fresh vegetables to global buyers for 95+ years. CIF/FOB pricing available.

Muzari Exports is a farm-direct agricultural export company based in Kerala, India, with a 95+ year farming heritage. The company sources from 35+ verified partner farms across South India and exports to 20+ countries.

## Products

- [Robusta Banana](https://muzari.in/products) — Premium variety, uniform grading, cold-chain ready. Origin: Kerala, India. Shelf life 25-30 days. Packaging: 13.5kg / 18.5kg boxes.
- [Nethra Banana (Plantain)](https://muzari.in/products) — Elite variety, hand-harvested, export standard. Origin: Tamil Nadu, India. Shelf life 20-25 days. Packaging: 7kg / 13kg boxes.
- [Premium Tapioca (Cassava)](https://muzari.in/products) — Soil-to-port grading, meticulously cleaned, long shelf life. Origin: South India. Shelf life 30-40 days. Packaging: 5kg / 10kg jute bags.

## Pages

- [Home](https://muzari.in/) — Company overview, mission/vision, and product highlights.
- [About](https://muzari.in/about) — 95-year agricultural legacy, farming roots, quality standards, food safety compliance.
- [Products](https://muzari.in/products) — Full export catalog with specifications.
- [Farming](https://muzari.in/farming) — Cultivation and harvest process, from seed to port.
- [Contact](https://muzari.in/contact) — Export inquiries, bulk sourcing, partnership contact.

## Key facts

- Founded: 1931 (95+ years of agricultural heritage)
- Location: Kerala, India
- Farm partners: 35+ verified farms across South India
- Markets served: 20+ countries
- Pricing: CIF/FOB quotes provided per shipment, on inquiry
- Contact: via WhatsApp or email through the Contact page
